home.servicesSub: Three generations of weaving, washing and restoring Himalayan rugs.
home.featuredSub: Hand-knotted in the valley, each one signed by its weavers.
home.ctaBody: Send us a sketch, a photo, or just an idea — our weavers will turn it into a one-of-a-kind rug.

catalog.title: Our rugs
catalog.intro: Every piece is hand-knotted from Himalayan wool, dyed in small batches, and washed in mountain water.
catalog.empty: No rugs in this category yet — check back soon.

home.title: Shah Washing — Handwoven Carpets & Rugs from Nepal
